_comment: GitHub Pages does NOT support server-side 301 redirects.
These redirects are handled client-side via the 404.html fallback page.
For proper 301 redirects (SEO-friendly), migrate to Vercel or Cloudflare Pages,
which support _redirects files or next.config.ts redirects natively.
